ItiPāḷimuttakavinayavinicchayasaṅgahe/X/.text: Paribhuñjitabbato yāva majjhantiko kālo assāti yāvakālikaṁ (Sī)

variants.reading: Paribhuñjitabbato yāva majjhantiko kālo assāti yāvakālikaṁ

ItiPāḷimuttakavinayavinicchayasaṅgahe/X/.text: Ānisadassa (Ka, Kaṅkhā-Ṭṭha 221. piṭṭhe ca) Vi-Ṭṭha 3. 92 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/139.text: Yāva na sampaṭicchati, tāva naṁ laddhi rakkhati (Vi-Ṭṭha 3. 303 piṭṭhe.)

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/181.text: Ojampi haranti (Sī) Vi 3. 207 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/212.text: Vāsitāya (Sī), vāsikāya (Ka) Vi-Ṭṭha 4. 103 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/229.text: Saṁghassa tiṇaṁ vā vatthusmiṁ (Sī), saṁghassa dinnaṁ vatthusmiṁ (Ka), saṁghi- ketiṇavatthusmiṁ (Kaṅkhā-Ṭṭha 263 piṭṭhe) Vi-Ṭṭha 4. 82 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Vinayasaṅgahaṭṭhakathā/X/X/233.text: Vi-Ṭṭha 1. 195 piṭṭhe. 2. Khu 11. 150 piṭṭhe Milindapañhe. 3. Vi 3. 348 piṭṭhe.

Vinayasaṅgahaṭṭhakathā/X/X/234.text: Vi-Ṭṭha 1. 195 piṭṭhe. 2. Khu 11. 150 piṭṭhe Milindapañhe. 3. Vi 3. 348 piṭṭhe.

Vinayasaṅgahaṭṭhakathā/X/X/248.text: Hutvā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ vā āpattiṁ āpajjeyyuṁ vibbhameyyuṁ vā (Vi-Ṭṭha 4. 13 piṭṭhe)

variants.reading: Hutvā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ vā āpattiṁ āpajjeyyuṁ vibbhameyyuṁ vā
